metadata.name: SuperTeam
metadata.description: Seven-stage delivery plugin with main-session-as-orchestrator architecture and hook-enforced trust chain

plugins.name: superteam
plugins.description: V4.7 main-session-as-orchestrator with PLAN Tier A done in V4.7.3 (self-stop/stage-skip/artifact-forge all hook-blocked) and PLAN Tier B done in V4.7.4. V4.7.4 adds: per-role Output Discipline rules across reviewer/verifier/writer/planner/architect/executor; Stop-hook escalation diagnostic on 3+ gate-block clusters in 60s; three new slash commands /superteam:debug, /superteam:repair, /superteam:doctor for triage and recovery. Only PLAN Tier C1 - the end-to-end pytest trust-chain suite - remains, and that is testing infrastructure, not a bug-fix backlog.
